text: Yeah yeah, yeah yeah, move that love. Yeah yeah, like blah blah blah. Now we're 13 and it's all on me. You just bought a shot to make me feel like I'm the only girl in the world, like I'm the only one that you ever loved, like I'm the only one I'm after, all these girls in the world. Come and move, come and move, boy, boy, can you get it up? Come and move, boy, boy, is she picking up? Work, work, work, work, work, it's in me, yeah, baby, work, work, work, work, work, it's in me, do me that, so me, baby, work, work, work, work, work.
